Python: Complete 20 Python coding exercises and build one CLI application.
NumPy: Implement array operations, broadcasting, and matrix multiplication.
Pandas: Analyze a CSV dataset and perform cleaning and visualization.
Machine Learning: Train Logistic Regression, Decision Tree, and Random Forest models.
Deep Learning: Build an image classifier using TensorFlow.
Transformers: Fine-tune a Hugging Face transformer on a text classification task.
RAG: Build a Retrieval-Augmented Generation chatbot using LangChain.
FastAPI: Develop and deploy a REST API with CRUD operations.
